title: (Ko, En, De, Jpn) 이별해도 괜찮게 | 김지윤 좋은연애연구소 소장 | 연애 추천 강연 강의 | 세바시 677회
text: Hello The title is "Fine Breakups" Today's topic is about breakups So I prepared the title to "Fine Breakups" Some people would say, "What is a breakup?" "I can't even date someone" "Let's talk after I meet someone" You'd say that. It's too bad, and I'm upset, too. When was my first breakup? It's a secret But what I can tell you is that I wasn't good at it, so I hurt him, and he hurt me too And that wound lasted for a very long time My second breakup is also a secret But what I can tell you is, I was clumsy and bad at it. I hurt myself and him again. It made it so hard for me when I was in my next relationship and I had my ups and downs I don't know how your breakup was I'm sure you weren't that different from me That's what I think. So some people say this "I can't start love because I'm afraid of breaking up" "It's not that there's no one who likes me, but it's only because I'm afraid of breaking up" That's right. We're afraid of breaking up, so even though we have so many people who like us, we're very afraid to start a new one So, the most common modifier for a breakup is the word "beautiful breakup" I think you'll be able to see this expression the most widely I honestly don't know about beautiful breakups so the breakup that I'd like to recommend and pursue is a 'fine breakup' The fine breakup I define is... A year later, when you meet your ex at somewhere like COEX by chance We can awkwardly wave our hands and say hi to them If we met by chance, I don't think it's my personality to make a fuss about it or really act gladly But neither it's not right to give cold shoulders to a person that I once loved I think that would make our lives are a bit sad So my goal is when I meet my ex by chance, secretly telling them 'I know you exist'. That is the appropriate way to handle In order for us to break up nicely, there are some rules to tell you First rule is "Face to Face rule" You have to look at this face for the first breakup These days, you can confess your love with a facebook message but also have a breakup through online messages. The first principle is that you have to look at each other's faces and say goodbye There was a survey. They asked the men when was the most hurtful breakup It was

text: love with a facebook message but also have a breakup through online messages. The first principle is that you have to look at each other's faces and say goodbye There was a survey. They asked the men when was the most hurtful breakup It was when a woman announces her breakup with her kakaotalk Oh, they asked the same thing to the girls too It was when they ghosted (disappearing suddenly without a word) Ah.. It looks like you got ghosted a lot... Um, the common thing about this is that we didn't look at their faces They must've felt sorry, embarrassed, or even lost their words on what to say They don't know what to say nor where to even start That's why we communicate with each other through indirect communication, but we're sorry for that. Anyway, the other person hurts you a lot and raises your pawn a lot That's why breaking up should always be face to face and despite the difficulty, bringing up a story is the first way to make a breakup okay Second, you have to say goodbye like you're flirting with them Break ups also need some "flirting" process. You guys have all flirted, right? Oh..There's something called "flirting" There's a such thing called flirting in this world Flirting is when a guy and a girl is constantly texting and wonders every meaning of the text 'What does this emoji mean? Does he like me or not?" It's very confusing. So usually you take a screenshot and send it to your friends and ask The judges are waiting to give you conclusions Whether if this has a chance in developing. They will go like, "Wow he really like you" But turns out they were wrong and you just got your hopes up. Things like this That is called flirting. Flirting's core is all about uncertainty It's confusing. So you have to draw a gentle downward curve when you're breaking up just like when you're flirting It's very important to do that So, to put it simply, you shouldn't break up just like the breaking news When does the breaking news come out? Heavy rain, tornado, earthquake, literally in emergencies One day, if you suddenly say "Hi, today we are breaking up." and announce it like breaking news, it's will feel like a disaster to the other person What we need to do is... we need to do it like the weather forecast How does a weather forecast work? They give them a preview of the season "It will be very sunny in this summer, or there will be a lot of rain this week" Even in winter, they first give you a preview "There will be heavy snow", things like

title: (Ko, En, De, Jpn) 이별해도 괜찮게 | 김지윤 좋은연애연구소 소장 | 연애 추천 강연 강의 | 세바시 677회
text: How does a weather forecast work? They give them a preview of the season "It will be very sunny in this summer, or there will be a lot of rain this week" Even in winter, they first give you a preview "There will be heavy snow", things like this So when we say goodbye, we must do it like the weather forecast The weekly weather forecast is also like that "Today will be very good, but weekend is very cloudy, so prepare an umbrella when you go out" At least so that the other person can have the time to prepare an umbrella You have to talk like you're flirting with someone. The best way to talk is to make the other person confusing "Since we've been together for about a year, there's not much to say when I'm with you.." "I mean I'm just saying ^^" The core sentence in this conversation is "I mean I'm just saying" Another example is, "Ashely, I've seen it somewhere and if couples are like this, they mostly break up soon" "I mean I'm just saying it" The most important thing is to say "I mean I'm just saying it" Because it doesn't mean that I'm saying that I'm going to break up with you In this process, couples can talk about why they've become like this and maybe even solve, but if that doesn't work they could end things knowing it in advance So it's best to tell them like the weather forecast In other words, breakups shouldn't be just one sided but it should in a indirect sentence like, "I want to break up." Not "Let's break up" If you are able to this, it will be good for the ones who have once loved each other Thirdly, we need to share the reason for breaking up Mostly they don't talk to each other and just break up. The saddest thing is when someone breaks up without knowng the reason "Why did you break up?" "I don't know. She didn't tell me." It would make the other person feel so devastated and painful, right? So it's very important to share what we failed to coordinate and what we failed to do That's how this person starts their next love, and know the reasons that are holding them back, and be more confident in the next step Since you'll never see them again just honestly spill it out Then, if we agreed and broke up, breakups must be agreed upon. After this, there's something very important that you have to do after you break up And that is having a mourning time. The most important thing in breakup is "mourning" Then what's mourning? It's the act of grieving. A breakup must be accompanied by condolences In that way you can get new

text: you have to do after you break up And that is having a mourning time. The most important thing in breakup is "mourning" Then what's mourning? It's the act of grieving. A breakup must be accompanied by condolences In that way you can get new space as the pain goes back to where it should be What are there in mourning? Crying, talking to your friends, more crying, etc. Things like that aren't obnoxious but rather good to do Going to the cafe that we went before is not being plaintive but is rather an act of mourning Don't drag out your friend. "She's gone now. Get out of here" From now on give them 20$ and say, "It's your breakup support fund" "You will be able to drink 4 more shots" Also, going back to the destination they went before is one of our condolences Erasing pictures also counts Matching rings are too difficult to deal with Well, donate it or put it in the tail of a dog passing by the neighborhood Then, love will go

title: (Ko, En, De, Jpn) 이별해도 괜찮게 | 김지윤 좋은연애연구소 소장 | 연애 추천 강연 강의 | 세바시 677회
text: oing back to the destination they went before is one of our condolences Erasing pictures also counts Matching rings are too difficult to deal with Well, donate it or put it in the tail of a dog passing by the neighborhood Then, love will go away It's heartbreaking but it's a very important act of mourning You have to bear that moment when love actually goes away and this is crucial to do Umm..Have you seen a Japanese movie called "Love Letter"? You know the movie where the woman shouts "How are you doing?" on the snow-covered mountain Why is that scene a great scene? That's a mourning scene She's finally venting her grief. So we must be sad and mourn But at this point, we all know that a person must cry for his or her sadness, right? That way, I can be able to cry for others The most important preparation for the next love is to be sad enough for the sadness to go away. But in this aspect, there are many moments where I felt sorry for men Usually, we can't separate men and women, but generally I think women are relatively good at mourning. For woman, if we counter a sudden breakup, what do we normally do? We give a hair style change Then, we talk to our friends about our relationship from the beginning to the end Next, another friend comes. They don't get tired and talk again from the beginning to the end Then the 3rd friend comes. What do we do? Again from the beginning to the end, we talk about it And sometimes you miss some parts because you're tired. Then, the first friend will get back to the point and explain it for you "Wait, let's talk about that. The part when you sent the wrong message. That's important!" So then she'll go like, "She sent the wrong message to him (blah)." This is how most women collectively mourn together But I think there are many cases where men don't have this process What happens once men break up suddenly? First of all, they get very devastated.They usually stay still. So people around them don't know. If you have a friend or senior who is quick-witted, they will notice the fastest and ask, "I didn't see you with your girlfriend lately." Then, he'll say "We broke up" And then they'll go, "Let's have a drink." And he chooses to black out I think for men, it's really hard to see them express the sadness when they're sober I think that's why they all lose our minds and cry the hell out After that, their heart aches even if they wake up, so they choose to play basketball or play foot volleyball and stretch their ligaments, or get their Achilles twisted to forget their sadness through physical pain Mourning is very important. So, I hope we can give our men the freedom to cry Don't make fun of a crying man. Let's not upload it on facebook even though we see a crying man in the subway 'OMG There's a man crying right now.. Must have had a hard breakup' Do not do this kind of stuff We have to mourn with them, right? Praying for their passionate love to heal Also, don't tease your little brother even if he cries If your brother had a breakup and is crying in his room, don't barge in and tease him by saying, "Wow.. Are you crying? Mom! he's crying" The worse part is their mom will come and say things like, "I knew it" Instead you should get him outside and buy him some food and let him cry comfortably So I hope guys can cry more and give them the right to express their feelings more openly Humans have a mysterious inner side that can be cured and empowered through loss or some kind of wound It's a very painful process to say goodbye, but if you endure it well, It can be a gift of life to possess strong inner strength So, I don't think it's not an exaggeration to say that the moment of the separation determines whether our love was beautiful or not As passionate as the moment of our love was, I hope you make the best choice in the moment of separation This was Kim Jiyoon of "Fine Breakups" lecture
